name: Gundula Ring
recipeIngredient: 3 drops oetker baking essence, bitter almond
recipeInstructions:
If the pastry should be rather soft, add up to 50g flour. Roll out the pastry to a rectangle of 20X22 inches (about 50X55 cm). Brush with fat and cut lengthways into two halves.
FOR THE FILLING: combine the filling ingredients and distribute over the two pieces of pastry, leaving a 2-inch border free at the cut edge. Roll up each piece of pastry, starting from the outer edge. Entwine the two rolls together and place as a ring on a greased baking sheet. Brush with milk and make cuts 1 cm deep in the surface.
OVEN: moderately hot
BAKING TIME: about 30 minutes
